query:
ALTER TABLE order_items 
  ADD COLUMN stockSource varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN stockSourceArrivalWeek varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN snapshotEnStock int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN snapshotEnTransit int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN color varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL;
